steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $2y+18x=9 → y=-9x+9/2$. So the slope of the given line is $-9$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $1/9$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
